castor
======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which castor installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using castor, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load castor/1.8.5-foss-2023a
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
